ab: Tiang nga kaviaz nak, uva’az amin aipa Bunun.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Tiang，他也布農族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Tiang, and he is also an Bunun child.

ab: muskun cam ihan Malavi’ tu acang masipul.
ch: 我們一起在潭南部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Malavi’ tribe.

ab: lucbut cam muskun tan’a madadengaz taqu paliqabasan, amin cam maqanciap malasBunun.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說布農語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Bunun proficiently.

ab: madaqvas cak ka masboq, maqa Tiang nga maputis sa makuis.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Tiang很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Tiang is short and thin.

ab: makackac ca Tiang nga, amin cam asa cia.
ch: Taing很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Tiang is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
